seo.title: The Journey | The Divine Blueprint
seo.description: The Journey — The Divine Blueprint discipleship journey.

textFields.label: Main heading — The Journey of Becoming
textFields.value: The Journey of Becoming

textFields.label: Paragraph — Follow the progression from light and adoption to maturity, fel…
textFields.value: Follow the progression from light and adoption to maturity, fellowship, and manifestation.

textFields.label: Subheading — The Light of Men
textFields.value: The Light of Men

textFields.label: Paragraph — Explore how God brings light, identity, order, and purpose into…
textFields.value: Explore how God brings light, identity, order, and purpose into a life that was once without form, void, and in darkness.

textFields.label: Subheading — If Children, Then Heirs
textFields.value: If Children, Then Heirs

textFields.label: Paragraph — Discover the spiritual transaction of redemption and translatio…
textFields.value: Discover the spiritual transaction of redemption and translation, and what it means to become an heir of God and a joint heir with Christ.

textFields.label: Subheading — Partakers of His Divine Nature
textFields.value: Partakers of His Divine Nature

textFields.label: Paragraph — Understand how believers participate in Christ’s holiness, acce…
textFields.value: Understand how believers participate in Christ’s holiness, access to the Father, and resurrection power through the indwelling Spirit.

textFields.label: Subheading — But Is Under Tutors
textFields.value: But Is Under Tutors

textFields.label: Paragraph — Learn why spiritual inheritance does not eliminate the need for…
textFields.value: Learn why spiritual inheritance does not eliminate the need for instruction, discipline, mentors, and God’s appointed formation process.

textFields.label: Subheading — Becoming Sons
textFields.value: Becoming Sons

textFields.label: Paragraph — Move from spiritual childhood toward mature sonship marked by r…
textFields.value: Move from spiritual childhood toward mature sonship marked by responsibility, obedience, discernment, and Christlike character.

textFields.label: Subheading — The Cross in the Making of Sons
textFields.value: The Cross in the Making of Sons

textFields.label: Paragraph — Examine the indispensable work of the cross in producing humili…
textFields.value: Examine the indispensable work of the cross in producing humility, obedience, endurance, and a life fully surrendered to God.

textFields.label: Subheading — Knowledge in the Making of Sons
textFields.value: Knowledge in the Making of Sons

textFields.label: Paragraph — Distinguish information from transforming knowledge and learn h…
textFields.value: Distinguish information from transforming knowledge and learn how truth, revelation, and spiritual understanding shape mature sons.

textFields.label: Subheading — The Fellowship of the Spirit in the Making of Sons
textFields.value: The Fellowship of the Spirit in the Making of Sons

textFields.label: Paragraph — Discover how fellowship with the Holy Spirit and the body of Ch…
textFields.value: Discover how fellowship with the Holy Spirit and the body of Christ nurtures intimacy, guidance, power, and maturity.

textFields.label: Subheading — The Manifestation of the Sons of God
textFields.value: The Manifestation of the Sons of God

textFields.label: Paragraph — Bring the journey to its intended fruit: mature sons expressing…
textFields.value: Bring the journey to its intended fruit: mature sons expressing God’s character, stewarding His gifts, serving others, and raising disciples.
